title: [CQP] Crafting Quick Peek
description: This mod allows you to quickly peek at an item's Recipe(s) by holding Left Alt (Configurable)
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df3b5a44bbc240730fe5d36c1bcb19f5d2fcf0c8.png)

# Crafting Quick Peek
Quickly check how to craft an item without leaving your inventory screen.

![UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vm9dBhVc/images/54e90116e46b177602210ae416676cda1c2e2ba1_350.webp)

Crafting Tree Quick Peek is a client-side Fabric utility mod that adds a recipe overlay when hovering items in inventories.

## What It Does
- Hold a key while hovering an item to show its recipe.
- Shows crafting recipes as a mini 3x3 grid with output.
- Additionally shows smelting, blasting, and smoking recipes.
- Lets you cycle between multiple valid recipes.
- Shows the requierd materials for the hovered item.

## Controls (Default)
- `Left Alt`: show recipe overlay for hovered item.
- `R`: cycle recipe (while holding the peek key).

## Requirements
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Optional Integration
- Better Huds (optional): provides a toggle control to enable/disable this overlay from Better Huds UI.

## Multiplayer Safety
This is client-side only. It does not automate crafting or modify gameplay logic.
